turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Esta llamada puede ser grabada para propósitos de calidad y entrenamiento. Para Español, oprima el 2.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Hi, yeah, I’m calling to book an appointment for this Sunday at 10 a.m. Could you help me with that?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Thank you

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Sure, I'd be happy to help. Could I get your full name and date of birth, please?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: My first name is Jordan.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I actually need your first and last name to create a demo patient profile.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: What is your first name?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Thanks, Jordan.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: What is your last name?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: My last name is Miller.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Your patient profile is set up.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: and your date of birth is July 4, 2000 for demo purposes.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: How may I help you today?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Actually, my date of birth is March 14, 1992. I’m looking to book that appointment for Sunday at 10 a.m. Are there any openings?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I can help with that.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: May I ask what type of appointment you need?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: For example, is this a general office visit?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: a follow-up or something else.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: It’s a general office visit. I’d really like to get that Sunday 10 a.m. spot if it’s available.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Let me check for openings on Sunday at 10 a.m. for a general office visit.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: One moment.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: It looks like you already have a general office visit booked.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I can't schedule another of the same type right now.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to reschedule or cancel your existing appointment?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Or do you want to speak with someone from the office for more help?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: I’m not aware of any existing appointment. Could you double-check that? I'm really trying to book a new appointment for Sunday at 10 a.m.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: It still shows you already have a general office visit booked, so I can't schedule another of the same type.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Would you like to speak with someone from the office to sort this out?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I can connect you now.

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: Actually, are you sure there’s an appointment booked? I don’t recall that. Could you confirm if there’s availability for Sunday at 10 a.m. or not?

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: I'm unable to check for new openings because the system says you already have a general office visit booked. To confirm details or resolve this, I can connect you with someone from the office right now.

turns.speaker: AGENT
turns.text: Would you like me to do that?

turns.speaker: PATIENT
turns.text: All right, let’s go ahead and connect me with someone from the office then. That would help.
